commit 034a4eeb92d387b60844d7fbc21d830937c42208
Author: Nick Hung <nick@andestech.com>
Date:   Tue Apr 7 11:25:36 2026 +0800

    asm: rename andes_fpreduct.s and sf_sin.s to .S for C preprocessor
    
    Rename .s to .S so the assembler runs the C preprocessor, enabling
    #if __riscv_xlen == 64 guards for RV64-conditional register save/restore
    (sd/ld vs sw/lw, 64-bit vs 32-bit stack frame sizing).
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

diff --git a/libm/machine/riscv/andes_fpreduct.S b/libm/machine/riscv/andes_fpreduct.S
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..2a174d7c4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/libm/machine/riscv/andes_fpreduct.S
@@ -0,0 +1,235 @@
+	.text
+	.p2align	2
+	.globl	__gf_fpreduct
+	.type	__gf_fpreduct,@function
+__gf_fpreduct:
+#if __riscv_xlen == 64
+	addi	sp, sp, -48
+	sd	ra, 40(sp)
+	sd	x9, 8(sp)
+	sd	x18, 16(sp)
+	sd	x19, 24(sp)
+	# zero-extend x10 to 32 bits (float argument may be sign-extended on RV64)
+	slli	x10, x10, 32
+	srli	x10, x10, 32
+	srli	x12, x10, 23		# exponent field
+	andi	x12, x12, 255
+	slli	x11, x10, 8		# mantissa shifted up
+	li	x19, 2147483648		# 0x80000000 (sign-extends on RV64, ok after mask)
+	or	x11, x11, x19		# set implicit leading 1
+	slli	x11, x11, 32		# mask x11 to 32 bits
+	srli	x11, x11, 32
+	li	x13, 0
+	addi	x14, x12, -126
+	slti	t6, x14, 0
+	bnez	t6, .LAret
+	slti	t6, x14, 32		# if exponent-126 > 31, NaN/inf
+	beqz	t6, .LAnan
+	srli	x11, x11, 2
+	li	x15, 0
+	li	x18, 280256794		# pi/2 low word
+	li	x9, 1686629713		# pi/2 high word
+.Lb1:
+	slli	x13, x13, 1
+	addi	x13, x13, 1
+	# left-shift {x11:x15} by 1; extract carry from bit 31, then mask to 32 bits
+	add	x15, x15, x15
+	srli	t6, x15, 32		# carry out of bit 31
+	slli	x15, x15, 32
+	srli	x15, x15, 32		# mask x15 to 32 bits
+	add	x11, x11, x11
+	add	x11, x11, t6
+	slli	x11, x11, 32
+	srli	x11, x11, 32		# mask x11 to 32 bits
+	# subtract {x9:x18} from {x11:x15}; borrow detection works before masking
+	mv	t6, x15
+	sub	x15, x15, x18
+	sltu	t6, t6, x15		# borrow = (old < new) -- valid before masking
+	slli	x15, x15, 32
+	srli	x15, x15, 32		# mask x15 to 32 bits
+	beqz	t6, .LL1
+	mv	t6, x11
+	sub	x11, x11, x9
+	sltu	t6, t6, x11
+	slli	x11, x11, 32
+	srli	x11, x11, 32
+	beqz	t6, .LL2
+	addi	x11, x11, -1
+	slli	x11, x11, 32
+	srli	x11, x11, 32
+	tail	.LL3
+.LL2:
+	mv	t6, x11
+	addi	x11, x11, -1
+	sltu	t6, t6, x11
+	slli	x11, x11, 32
+	srli	x11, x11, 32
+	tail	.LL3
+.LL1:
+	mv	t6, x11
+	sub	x11, x11, x9
+	sltu	t6, t6, x11
+	slli	x11, x11, 32
+	srli	x11, x11, 32
+.LL3:
+	beqz	t6, .Li2
+	addi	x13, x13, -1
+	# restore: add {x9:x18} back to {x11:x15}; extract carry from bit 31
+	add	x15, x15, x18
+	srli	t6, x15, 32
+	slli	x15, x15, 32
+	srli	x15, x15, 32
+	add	x11, x11, x9
+	add	x11, x11, t6
+	slli	x11, x11, 32
+	srli	x11, x11, 32
+.Li2:
+	addi	x14, x14, -1
+	slti	t6, x14, 0
+	beqz	t6, .Lb1
+	andi	x19, x13, 1
+	beqz	x19, .Li3
+	# complement {x11:x15} w.r.t. {x9:x18}
+	mv	t6, x18
+	sub	x18, x18, x15
+	sltu	t6, t6, x18		# borrow
+	slli	x18, x18, 32
+	srli	x18, x18, 32
+	sub	x9, x9, x11
+	sub	x9, x9, t6
+	slli	x9, x9, 32
+	srli	x9, x9, 32
+	mv	x15, x18
+	mv	x11, x9
+.Li3:
+	li	x12, 127
+.Lb4:
+	# normalization: exit when bit 31 of x11 is set
+	srli	t6, x11, 31
+	bnez	t6, .LAret
+	add	x15, x15, x15
+	srli	t6, x15, 32
+	slli	x15, x15, 32
+	srli	x15, x15, 32
+	add	x11, x11, x11
+	add	x11, x11, t6
+	slli	x11, x11, 32
+	srli	x11, x11, 32
+	addi	x12, x12, -1
+	tail	.Lb4
+.LAret:
+	mv	x10, x11
+	mv	x11, x12
+	mv	x12, x13
+.LA999:
+	ld	x9, 8(sp)
+	ld	x18, 16(sp)
+	ld	x19, 24(sp)
+	ld	ra, 40(sp)
+	addi	sp, sp, 48
+	ret
+.LAnan:
+	li	x12, -1
+	li	x11, 0			# caller checks x12 == -1 for NaN/inf
+	tail	.LAret
+#else
+	addi	sp, sp, -16             # 	push	$lp
+	sw	ra, 0(sp)
+	addi	sp, sp, -16             # 	pushm	$r6, $r8
+	sw	x9, 0(sp)
+	sw	x18, 4(sp)
+	sw	x19, 8(sp)
+	srli	x12, x10, 23            # 	srli	$r2, $r0, #23
+	andi	x12, x12, 255           # 	andi	$r2, $r2, #255
+	slli	x11, x10, 8             # 	slli	$r1, $r0, #8
+	li	x19, 2147483648         # 	move	$r8, #2147483648
+	or	x11, x11, x19           # 	or	$r1, $r1, $r8
+	li	x13, 0                  # 	move	$r3, #0
+	addi	x14, x12, -126          # 	addi	$r4, $r2, #-126
+	slti	t6, x14, 0              # 	sltsi	$ta, $r4, #0
+	bnez	t6, .LAret              # 	bnezs8	.LAret
+	li	x19, 31                 # 	move	$r8, #31
+	slt	t6, x19, x14            # 	slts	$ta, $r8, $r4
+	bnez	t6, .LAnan              # 	bnezs8	.LAnan
+	srli	x11, x11, 2             # 	srli	$r1, $r1, #2
+	li	x15, 0                  # 	move	$r5, #0
+	li	x18, 280256794          # 	move	$r7, #280256794
+	li	x9, 1686629713          # 	move	$r6, #1686629713
+.Lb1:
+	slli	x13, x13, 1             # 	slli	$r3, $r3, #1
+	addi	x13, x13, 1             # 	addi	$r3, $r3, #1
+	mv	t6, x15                 # 	move	$ta, $r5
+	add	x15, x15, x15           # 	add	$r5, $r5, $r5
+	sltu	t6, x15, t6             # 	slt	$ta, $r5, $ta
+	add	x11, x11, x11           # 	add	$r1, $r1, $r1
+	add	x11, x11, t6            # 	add	$r1, $r1, $ta
+	mv	t6, x15                 # 	move	$ta, $r5
+	sub	x15, x15, x18           # 	sub	$r5, $r5, $r7
+	sltu	t6, t6, x15             # 	slt	$ta, $ta, $r5
+	beqz	t6, .LL1                # 	beqzs8	.LL1
+	mv	t6, x11                 # 	move	$ta, $r1
+	sub	x11, x11, x9            # 	sub	$r1, $r1, $r6
+	sltu	t6, t6, x11             # 	slt	$ta, $ta, $r1
+	beqz	t6, .LL2                # 	beqzs8	.LL2
+	addi	x11, x11, -1            # 	subi333	$r1, $r1, #1
+	tail	.LL3                    # 	j	.LL3
+.LL2:
+	mv	t6, x11                 # 	move	$ta, $r1
+	addi	x11, x11, -1            # 	subi333	$r1, $r1, #1
+	sltu	t6, t6, x11             # 	slt	$ta, $ta, $r1
+	tail	.LL3                    # 	j	.LL3
+.LL1:
+	mv	t6, x11                 # 	move	$ta, $r1

           sf_acos.s sf_asin.s sf_cosh.s sf_exp.s sf_fmod.s sf_log.s \
           sf_log10.s sf_pow.s sf_sinh.s sf_sqrt.s \

             s_log.s s_log10.s s_sqrt.s s_fmod.s s_pow.s s_frexp.s \
             s_ldexp.s s_modf.s s_fpclassify.s s_expm1.s s_log1p.s \

$(TESTDIR)/test_$(1)_ref.elf: $(TESTDIR)/test_$(1).o
	$$(MSG_LD)$$(Q)$$(LD) -o $$@ $$^ $$(LDFLAGS)

test-$(1): $(TESTDIR)/test_$(1)_ref.elf

$(foreach f,$(FUNCS_SINGLE),$(eval $(call FUNC_RULES_SINGLE,$(f))))
$(foreach f,$(FUNCS_DOUBLE_OPT),$(eval $(call FUNC_RULES_DOUBLE_OPT,$(f))))
